wiki.summary: glitter ✩‧₊˚ by lexycat features two samples from Nokia phone models. One being turn Me On from the LG Lotus and the other being Modern Life from the LG Nite 230. Specifically, this song features the mashup done by a user who goes by the name of Spiro on YouTube. The album illustration features 袴田 ひなた (Hinata Hakamada) from the anime and manga ロウきゅーぶ! (Ro-Kyu-Bu!). The artwork was made in the doujin circle that goes by てぃんくる (Tinker Bell) and it was used on the cover for the Blue-ray of the fifth episode Read more on Last.fm.
